title: Tambacounda Heat Wave
lead: Tambacounda is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.34. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Tambacounda is characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 33%, and the wind speed is 14.4 km/h, contributing to the extreme heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
